testcase.name: Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Student Authentication Redirects › should save intended destination and redirect after login

failure.message: auth-redirect-integration.spec.ts:26:5 should save intended destination and redirect after login

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth-redirect-integration.spec.ts:26:5 › Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Student Authentication Redirects › should save intended destination and redirect after login › Login and verify redirect
TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByLabel('Student Email', { exact: true }) to be visible
at utils\test-locators.ts:240
238 | */ 239 | async safeFill(locator: Locator, value: string, timeout: number = 10000): Promise<void> { > 240 | await locator.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout }); | ^ 241 | await locator.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(); 242 | await locator.clear(); 243 | await locator.fill(value); at StudentAuthPage.safeFill (D:\code\GitHub\Personal\BAS-Web\BAS\tests\utils\test-locators.ts:240:19) at D:\code\GitHub\Personal\BAS-Web\BAS\tests\auth-redirect-integration.spec.ts:42:27 at D:\code\GitHub\Personal\BAS-Web\BAS\tests\auth-redirect-integration.spec.ts:40:18

testcase.name: Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Student Authentication Redirects › should show return URL display on login page

failure.message: auth-redirect-integration.spec.ts:54:5 should show return URL display on login page

testcase.failure:

testcase.failure:
